yourPlate.text: David Cooke / Pell City 807 Martin St S - call this morning on revived project.
GMX/Hamilton extension - sign/return May 13 due-diligence extension counterpart if no comments.
Emerson/Lately Projects - push lease signature this week.
Pell City Ellianos LOI - call Wallace/Keith with feedback when ready.
Pell City PT/Home Health RFP - challenge/value-engineer pricing, especially ceiling tile line.
Diego / Buena Vista purchase inquiry - call back on price/site conditions.
Hamilton laundromat/vacancy - TI/rent discussion once Adam starts.
Shoe Dept / Malone - lock construction timeline and lease-obligation map with Clay.
New Memphis late fee - decide lease language: $100 or 5%, whichever greater.
Pell City facade - decide pressure wash vs repaint path.

prepping.text: UPS Store / McMinnville - executed LOI return + application/financial forms response.
Five Below / Malone - layout/elevation review notes + lease exhibit checklist.
MacBid expansion - outreach draft on Evansville/Hamilton/San Antonio/Harrison/Gastonia.
Crunch Fitness / McMinnville - floor-plan reply draft.
Buena Vista blast - listing email/contact list for approval.
Buena Vista Millrose/Lennar - two pitch drafts.
Buena Vista prior bid/sod materials - outreach/context packet.
Malone small-shop flyer send - prospect list + copy after flyer is done.
Jason Jones / Malone Card Show - short-term rental reply/questions.
Dr. Michael Dupre / Pell City - lead summary + suggested follow-up.
Cleveland Furniture Bank - draft is loaded, waiting for approval.
Jordyn Stallings daycare/playground - draft is loaded, waiting for approval.

handling.text: Finish Malone flyer - internal asset/package prep.
Adam onboarding - first-week plan + leasing cadence outline.
Parker Asana cleanup - reconcile delegation notice/tasks.
Big Board hygiene - prep cleanup of stale Asana-only ghosts.

deferred.text: T115 Camile JV - deferred unless reopened; T106 Joe Wesley + T107 Yasser - waiting; T137 Academy - watching; T019 Runnings, T048 Vercel, T131 Label Shopper, T132 Adam housing - future/backlog.

new.name: Wingstop
new.status: LOI signed last week - it now heads to their REC. They did not have a firm date, but said early May.

new.name: UPS store
new.status: Working through the final details with Petty, but I expect this one will be finalized this week too. Excited to have these two done.

new.name: Pell City Physical Therapy
new.status: They said they'd have the lease draft to me this week.

new.name: Great Greek
new.status: Clay coordinated with EJ. They went out to assess the suite last Friday, so we should be about there on this one too. I'll connect with Joey and get the latest

dropped.name: McMinnville Plaza
dropped.lastStatus: Both UPS and Wingstop are in their court. I want to talk through a scenario with the Wingstop deal in our meeting. It'll be easier to explain in person. Mainly just looking for your experience on how you've handled something in the past.

dropped.name: Evansville
dropped.lastStatus: Lauri said on 4/14 she cannot get in front of their CEO until Thursday 4/23. Leasing Hire I have reached out to schedule reference calls for Adam. I have one at 10 a.m., immediately before our meeting and another one this afternoon

dropped.name: Fostr
dropped.lastStatus: I have access, and I'll show you in our meeting. Our data is still in the process of syncing, but glad to have our hands on the new thing. I think it will be good for our team.

dropped.name: Sevierville CosmoProf
dropped.lastStatus: I'll walk you through their revised offer in the meeting. I have some notes prepped, but ran out of time to get them in here before the reference call.

progressed.name: Emerson
progressed.from: Lease is in their court. Ashby and I gave on 90% of the stuff they requested.
progressed.to: I haven't fully been able to look at all the changes that Ashby and their attorney made, but at first glance, I think we will be fine with all of them. Just wanted to bring this up since it seems like they are pushing to get this thing executed ASAP. I'm not sure if you have been copied on threads with Prather/Dylan and also Ashby and their attorney, but they followed up a few times about execution. I know we need to square away things with Fat Bottom before we do that, so it's worth discussing the game plan. Do you want me to connect with Ashby about sending them a letter?

progressed.name: Hope Smiles
progressed.from: Glad we finally have some good direction from them. I will keep tracking down some options with them
progressed.to: I'll give you the high-level update, but we had some good tours last week. Hopefully one will be a winner….

updated.name: Five below
updated.to: I did not hear from them last week and was hoping they would reach out. I will ping them today and get an update on REC.

items.text: Hamilton - finalize REA for Dutch Bros outparcel (with Melissa)
items.detail: Melissa using Hamilton as template. Jacob coordinating.
